videos.headline: Gevani McCoy goes 71 yards for Beavers TD
videos.description: Gevani McCoy goes off for a 71-yard touchdown to pad Oregon State's lead vs. UNLV.

videos.headline: UNLV turns fumble recovery into touchdown drive
videos.description: UNLV recover a fumble by Oregon State's Anthony Hankerson and turn it into a go-ahead touchdown through Hajj-Malik Williams.
